rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation annexes in valid implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Maintain scope consistency between AADL architecture and AGREE contracts
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
Use `guarantee "label": expression;` for output dependency contracts
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not invent declarations for unresolved references; use exact visible identifiers
irrelevant_topics: AGREE assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports
AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
